rss.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
rss.snippet: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

rss.title: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
rss.snippet: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.

rss.title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
rss.snippet: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

arxiv_papers.title: When RAG Chatbots Expose Their Backend: An Anonymized Case Study of Privacy and Security Risks in Patient-Facing Medical AI
arxiv_papers.snippet: Background: Patient-facing medical chatbots based on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) are increasingly promoted to deliver accessible, grounded health information. arxiv_papers.title: Position: agentic AI orchestration should be Bayes-consistent
arxiv_papers.snippet: LLMs excel at predictive tasks and complex reasoning tasks, but many high-value deployments rely on decisions under uncertainty, for example, which tool to call, which expert to consult, or how many resources to invest.
